The '''Coruscant Customs Bureau''' was the [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|customs enforcement service]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The Customs Bureau would inspect arriving and departing ships for irregularities in manifests and cargo. They would also document arriving and departing persons, the collection of duty fees, issue licenses for imports, and enforce customs trade laws.

==History==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] entered a [[Coruscant Customs Bureau building]] to do a search on [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] who had recently entered Coruscant. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], [[Republic Treasury/Legends|Republic Treasury]] [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Besany Wennen]] used information from the Customs Bureau to establish a paper trail for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] military buildup.
